items.caption: A slide from a presentation with a title "another scenario" at the top. below the title, there is a list of bullet points outlining a hypothetical data breach scenario involving target customers. the points mention that 110 million customers have had their personal data stolen, including credit and debit card data, customer names, and pin numbers. it is stated that one in three americans has been affected by the breach. the slide also includes a graphic of an atm machine on the right side. the background of the slide has a gradient of blue tones.
